CustomField.description: The date the program received the binder. Tip: Review the binder to make sure the coverage is adequate, note the cost, and make sure the organization is listed as an additionally insured or other interested party.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The date the program received the binder.
Tip: Review the binder to make sure the coverage is adequate, note the cost, and make sure the organization is listed as an additionally insured or other interested party.
CustomField.label: Insurance Binder Received
